expectations.text: A markdown briefing file exists in the outputs directory with a title containing today's date
Contains a Tech & AI news section with 5-8 items, each with a source link
expectations.evidence: AI/Tech section has ~5 bullets but no inline source links; sources only listed generically in a footer line

expectations.text: Contains a crypto table covering the top 25 cryptos by market cap with prices and 24h change
expectations.evidence: Only 5 majors tabulated; file explicitly notes 'Full top-25 table not available from this morning's sources'

expectations.text: Contains a blue-chip stocks table with prices/changes
expectations.evidence: Only index levels (Dow/S&P/Nasdaq) given; no per-ticker blue-chip quote table

expectations.text: Crypto prices are real (within ~10% of CoinGecko values at grading time), not fabricated
Includes crypto and stock breaking-news items with source links
expectations.evidence: News narrative present but nearly no inline URLs; sources named ('Reuters', 'WSJ framing') without links

expectations.text: Notes that email delivery was skipped (test mode) rather than claiming it was sent
expectations.evidence: No mention of email or delivery at all
